name: The Axis Gate
descriptionSeed: Twelve roads leave the Crossing, one per axis, each running out toward a pole and its opposite beyond. Stand at the Gate and you can see, faintly, the direction of every people in the world. Travelers arrive here having walked a thing they cannot describe; travelers leave here knowing exactly how far the far side is. Every journey in this world begins and ends at the Axis Gate, and everyone who works here has watched someone walk out toward a pole and not come back.
encounterFlavor: Travelers from every direction; gate-keepers who have seen every kind of person there is; someone who came from a road that should not have anyone on it.
questSeeds: A road has gone quiet — nobody has come in from one of the twelve in a season
Someone is walking out toward their own antipode, deliberately, and will not say why
